vivid/border/radius/none.$description: No border radius, resulting in sharp corners.

vivid/border/radius/xs.$description: A x-small border radius for subtle rounding of corners.

vivid/border/radius/sm.$description: A small border radius for subtle rounding of corners.

vivid/border/radius/md.$description: A medium border radius for moderate rounding of corners.

vivid/border/radius/lg.$description: A large border radius for more pronounced rounding of corners.

vivid/border/radius/xl.$description: An extra-large border radius for significant rounding of corners.

vivid/border/radius/pill.$description: A pill-shaped border radius that creates fully rounded corners, often used for buttons or badges.

vivid/border/radius/circular.$description: A circular border radius that creates a perfect circle when applied to a square element, often used for avatars or circular buttons.
